title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models as part of a full-stack AI initiative. The lineup includes MAI-Thinking-1 for reasoning, Scout as an always-on agent for work, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2 for quantum computing. This move positions Microsoft to compete directly with OpenAI while maintaining partnership.
